message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Player" as Player
rectangle "vc: VirologistController" as vc
rectangle "v:Virologist" as v
rectangle "rrs:RoundRunStrategy" as rrs
rectangle "vw:VirologistView" as vw

activate vc
Player -> vc : 1 collectEventListener(e: Event)
vc -> v : 2 getRoundRunStrategy()
activate v
v --> vc : 3 rrs
deactivate v
vc -> rrs : 4 collect(field: Field)
activate rrs
rrs --> vc : 5
deactivate rrs
vc -> vw : 6 renderActionMenu()
activate vw
vw --> vc : 7
deactivate vw
vc --> Player : 8
deactivate vc

@enduml
